settings.title: Monster Piercing | Straight Barbells
settings.text:
Straight Barbells, also known as tongue barbells are a unique and expressive form of body modification, and at Monster Piercing, we offer a diverse selection of tongue bars to suit different tastes and styles. Tongue bars, also known as tongue rings, are typically straight barbells that sit comfortably within the piercing, with rounded or decorative ends on both sides. Our collection includes tongue bars made from biocompatible materials such as surgical steel, titanium, and acrylic, ensuring both safety and durability for your piercing. 

We offer various designs, from classic smooth balls to more colorful options featuring UV-reactive materials, crystals, and fun shapes. Tongue piercings require jewelry that is easy to clean and safe for long-term wear, and our tongue bars are designed with both aesthetics and functionality in mind. Available in a range of sizes and lengths, our tongue bars ensure a comfortable fit while allowing you to express your individuality.
